data.text/markdown:
Double pendulum (marimo)

mechanics で導出した運動方程式を RK4 で数値積分し、軌道と時系列を描画します。

data.text/html:
Symbolic equations

Lagrangian

||[ L = - \left(- {\ell_1} \cos{\left({\theta_1} \right)} - {\ell_2} \cos{\left({\theta_2} \right)}\right) {g} {m_2} + \frac{\left({{\ell_1}}^2 \dot{{\theta_1}}^{2} + 2 {\ell_1} {\ell_2} \cos{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_1}} \dot{{\theta_2}} + {{\ell_2}}^2 \dot{{\theta_2}}^{2}\right) {m_2}}{2} + \frac{{{\ell_1}}^2 {m_1} \dot{{\theta_1}}^{2}}{2} + {\ell_1} {g} {m_1} \cos{\left({\theta_1} \right)} ||]

Euler-Lagrange equations

||[ \begin{cases}- \frac{\left(- 2 \left(\dot{{\theta_1}} - \dot{{\theta_2}}\right) {\ell_1} {\ell_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_2}} + 2 {{\ell_1}}^2 \ddot{{\theta_1}} + 2 {\ell_1} {\ell_2} \cos{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \ddot{{\theta_2}}\right) {m_2}}{2} - {{\ell_1}}^2 {m_1} \ddot{{\theta_1}} - {\ell_1} {\ell_2} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_1}} \dot{{\theta_2}} - {\ell_1} {g} {m_1} \sin{\left({\theta_1} \right)} - {\ell_1} {g} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} \right)} = 0\\- \frac{\left(- 2 \left(\dot{{\theta_1}} - \dot{{\theta_2}}\right) {\ell_1} {\ell_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_1}} + 2 {\ell_1} {\ell_2} \cos{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \ddot{{\theta_1}} + 2 {{\ell_2}}^2 \ddot{{\theta_2}}\right) {m_2}}{2} + {\ell_1} {\ell_2} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_1}} \dot{{\theta_2}} - {\ell_2} {g} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_2} \right)} = 0\\\end{cases} ||]

Solved accelerations

||[ \begin{cases}\ddot{{\theta_1}} = \frac{{\ell_1} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \cos{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_1}}^{2}}{- {\ell_1} {m_1} + {\ell_1} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_1} {m_2}} + \frac{{\ell_2} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_2}}^{2}}{- {\ell_1} {m_1} + {\ell_1} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_1} {m_2}} + \frac{{g} {m_1} \sin{\left({\theta_1} \right)}}{- {\ell_1} {m_1} + {\ell_1} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_1} {m_2}} + \frac{{g} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} \right)}}{- {\ell_1} {m_1} + {\ell_1} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_1} {m_2}} - \frac{{g} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_2} \right)} \cos{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)}}{- {\ell_1} {m_1} + {\ell_1} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_1} {m_2}}\\\ddot{{\theta_2}} = - \frac{{\ell_1} {m_1} \sin{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_1}}^{2}}{- {\ell_2} {m_1} + {\ell_2} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_2} {m_2}} - \frac{{\ell_1} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_1}}^{2}}{- {\ell_2} {m_1} + {\ell_2} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_2} {m_2}} - \frac{{\ell_2} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \cos{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} \dot{{\theta_2}}^{2}}{- {\ell_2} {m_1} + {\ell_2} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_2} {m_2}} - \frac{{g} {m_1} \sin{\left({\theta_1} \right)} \cos{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)}}{- {\ell_2} {m_1} + {\ell_2} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_2} {m_2}} + \frac{{g} {m_1} \sin{\left({\theta_2} \right)}}{- {\ell_2} {m_1} + {\ell_2} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_2} {m_2}} - \frac{{g} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_1} \right)} \cos{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)}}{- {\ell_2} {m_1} + {\ell_2} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_2} {m_2}} + \frac{{g} {m_2} \sin{\left({\theta_2} \right)}}{- {\ell_2} {m_1} + {\ell_2} {m_2} \cos^{2}{\left({\theta_1} - {\theta_2} \right)} - {\ell_2} {m_2}}\\\end{cases} ||]
